mapper.update: /*DisTrgFnlMapper.updateDisApdCntrNum*/ UPDATE MSP_DIS_APD A SET CONTRACT_NUM = (SELECT SVC_CNTR_NO FROM MCP_REQUEST_OSST@DL_MCP WHERE MVNO_ORD_NO = LPAD(A.RES_NO, 14, '0') AND PRGR_STAT_CD = 'OP2' AND RSLT_CD = '0000') ,RVISN_ID= 'BATCH2' ,RVISN_DTTM= SYSDATE WHERE A.REGST_DT BETWEEN #{strDt} || '000000' AND #{endDt} || '235959' AND A.CONTRACT_NUM IS NULL AND A.RVISN_DTTM IS NULL

/*DisTrgFnlMapper.insertDisTrgFnlInfo*/ INSERT INTO MSP_DIS_TRG_FNL_INF (TRG_FNL_INF_SEQ, REGST_DT, PROC_YN, CONTRACT_NUM, EVNT_CD, EVNT_TRTM_NO, EVNT_TRTM_DT, EFFECTIVE_DATE, REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM) SELECT 'TI' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') || TRIM(TO_CHAR(SQ_DIS_TI.NEXTVAL, '000000')) ,REGST_DT ,PROC_YN ,CONTRACT_NUM ,EVNT_CD ,EVNT_TRTM_NO ,EVNT_TRTM_DT ,EFFECTIVE_DATE ,REGST_ID ,REGST_DTTM FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS REGST_DT ,'N' AS PROC_YN ,CONTRACT_NUM ,EVNT_CD ,EVNT_TRTM_NO ,EVNT_TRTM_DT ,EFFECTIVE_DATE ,'BATCH2' AS REGST_ID ,SYSDATE AS REGST_DTTM FROM MSP_DIS_TRG_MST WHERE REGST_DT BETWEEN #{strDt} AND #{endDt} AND PROC_YN = 'T' ORDER BY EFFECTIVE_DATE )

/*DisTrgFnlMapper.updateDisTrgFnlInfo*/ UPDATE MSP_DIS_TRG_FNL_INF A SET PROC_YN = 'T' ,PROC_ID = 'BATCH2' ,PROC_DTTM = SYSDATE ,RSLT_CD = #{rsltCd} ,PRCS_SBST = #{prcsSbst} WHERE REGST_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND PROC_YN = 'N'
AND 'A' != (SELECT SUB_STATUS FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = CONTRACT_NUM)
AND A.EVNT_CD = 'SCH' AND A.EFFECTIVE_DATE < (SELECT MAX(REGST_DT) FROM MSP_DIS_APD WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND EVNT_CD = 'SCH')
AND A.EVNT_CD = 'NAC' AND 0 < (SELECT COUNT(CONTRACT_NUM) FROM MSP_DIS_APD WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND EVNT_CD = 'NAC')
AND A.EFFECTIVE_DATE <= (SELECT MAX(EFFECTIVE_DATE) FROM MSP_DIS_TRG_FNL_INF WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND TRG_FNL_INF_SEQ != A.TRG_FNL_INF_SEQ)
AND A.EVNT_CD = 'SIM' AND 'E' = (SELECT SUBSTR(SIM_INFO,36,1) FROM MSP_REQUEST_DTL WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM)
AND A.EVNT_CD = 'C07' AND '99991231000000' != (SELECT APPL_END_DTTM FROM MSP_DVC_CHG_AGNT_HST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND APPL_STRT_DTTM = (SELECT MAX(APPL_STRT_DTTM) FROM MSP_DVC_CHG_AGNT_HST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM) AND ROWNUM = 1)
AND 1=0
mapper.select: /*DisTrgFnlMapper.getProcDisTrgFnlInfo*/ SELECT V.TRG_FNL_INF_SEQ /*FNL_INF 시퀀스*/ ,V.CONTRACT_NUM /*계약번호*/ ,V.EVNT_CD /*업무구분*/ ,V.EVNT_TRTM_NO /*이벤트 처리번호*/ ,V.EVNT_TRTM_DT /*전문발생일시*/ ,V.EFFECTIVE_DATE /*이벤트적용일시*/ ,V.RATE_CD /*요금제*/ ,V.MODEL_ID /*단말모델아이디*/ ,V.MODEL_NM /*단말모델명*/ ,V.SLS_NO /*특별판매코드*/ ,(CASE WHEN (V.SIM_YN='Y' OR V.EVNT_CD='SIM') THEN 'UU2' ELSE V.SLS_TP END) AS SLS_TP /* 가입유형 */ ,(CASE WHEN (V.SIM_YN='Y' OR V.EVNT_CD='SIM') THEN V.SIM_ENGG_MNTH_CNT ELSE V.ENGG_MNTH_CNT END) AS ENGG_MNTH_CNT /*약정개월수*/ ,V.OPEN_AGNT_CD /*최초대리점*/ ,(CASE V.EVNT_CD WHEN 'C07' THEN V.AGNT_CD ELSE V.OPEN_AGNT_CD END) AS PRMT_AGNT_CD /*프로모션 적용 대리점*/ FROM ( WITH ADD_INFO AS( SELECT CONTRACT_NUM, SLS_NO, ENGG_MNTH_CNT FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY B.CONTRACT_NUM ORDER BY B.APP_START_DD DESC) AS RNK ,A.CONTRACT_NUM ,B.SLS_NO ,(CASE WHEN (B.SLS_NO IN (SELECT CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0092' AND ETC1 = 'MM2') AND B.ENGG_MNTH_CNT IS NULL AND B.INST_MNTH_CNT IS NOT NULL) THEN SUBSTR(B.INST_MNTH_CNT, 2) ELSE B.ENGG_MNTH_CNT END) AS ENGG_MNTH_CNT FROM MSP_DIS_TRG_FNL_INF A, MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM= B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.REGST_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.PROC_YN = 'N' AND B.SLS_NO IS NOT NULL AND B.EVNT_CD != 'SIM' /*전문유형이 SIM인 경우 ENGG_MNTH_CNT에 SIM약정이 들어가므로 SIM이벤트 제외처리*/ ) WHERE RNK=1 ), MODEL_INFO AS( SELECT CONTRACT_NUM, MODEL_ID, MODEL_NM FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY B.CONTRACT_NUM ORDER BY B.EVNT_TRTM_DT DESC) AS RNK ,A.CONTRACT_NUM ,B.MODEL_ID ,B.MODEL_NM FROM MSP_DIS_TRG_FNL_INF A, MSP_JUO_MODEL_INFO B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM= B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.REGST_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.PROC_YN = 'N' AND B.APP_END_DATE= '99991231000000' AND B.MODEL_TYPE= 'D1' ) WHERE RNK=1 ) SELECT A.TRG_FNL_INF_SEQ ,A.CONTRACT_NUM ,A.EVNT_CD ,A.EVNT_TRTM_NO ,A.EVNT_TRTM_DT ,A.EFFECTIVE_DATE ,B.OPEN_AGNT_CD /*최초대리점*/ ,B.LST_RATE_CD AS RATE_CD ,C.MODEL_ID ,C.MODEL_NM ,D.AGNT_CD /*기변대리점*/ ,E.SLS_NO ,E.ENGG_MNTH_CNT AS ENGG_MNTH_CNT ,(SELECT ETC1 FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID= 'CMN0092' AND CD_VAL= E.SLS_NO AND USG_YN='Y') AS SLS_TP ,(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(B.SIM_INFO,36,1) != 'E' AND SUBSTR(B.SIM_INFO,28,8) > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS SIM_YN ,SUBSTR(B.SIM_INFO,4,2) AS SIM_ENGG_MNTH_CNT FROM MSP_DIS_TRG_FNL_INF A ,MSP_REQUEST_DTL B ,MODEL_INFO C ,MSP_DVC_CHG_AGNT_HST D ,ADD_INFO E WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM= B.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND A.CONTRACT_NUM= D.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND A.CONTRACT_NUM= E.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND A.REGST_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND A.PROC_YN = 'N' AND A.EVNT_TRTM_NO= D.EVNT_TRTM_NO(+) AND A.EVNT_CD= D.EVNT_CD(+) ) V

/*DisTrgFnlMapper.checkDuplicateSoc*/ SELECT COUNT(CONTRACT_NUM) FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO A, CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE A.SOC = B.CD_VAL AND A.CONTRACT_NUM= #{contractNum} AND B.GRP_ID = 'RCP2042' AND B.ETC5 = 'DIS' AND A.SERVICE_TYPE= 'R' AND A.APP_END_DATE= '99991231000000' AND A.EXPIRATION_DATE >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')
mapper.insert: /* btchMgmtMapper.insertBatchRequest */ INSERT INTO CMN_BATCH_REQUEST (BATCH_JOB_ID, BATCH_REQ_ID, REQ_DTTM, EXEC_YN, EXEC_PARAM, EXEC_TYPE_CD, REG_ID, REG_DTTM, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM) VALUES ( #{batchId} ,BATCH_JOB_SEQ.nextVal ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ,'N' ,#{execParam} ,'SCHE' ,'BATCH2' ,SYSDATE ,'BATCH2' ,SYSDATE )
